query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.programId, a.turmaId, a.isActive, p.name AS programName FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id WHERE a.consultorId = 39 AND a.isActive = 1 ORDER BY a.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.programId, a.turmaId, a.isActive, p.name AS programName FROM alunos a LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id WHERE a.consultorId = 39 AND a.isActive = 1 ORDER BY a.name;
